data.name: Hentai Tales: Fallen Brave Squad
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

在完成棘手的難題時享受一個感性的故事！
使用板上的所有正方形連接數字
完成難題後，您將解鎖性感的新圖像和故事的下一部分！
您能完成每個難題並結識所有女孩嗎？

故事背景

“每個人，淫蕩的惡魔將軍的領土都在領先。”萊托伸直了她的背，“我們必須團結一致擊敗善於混淆人們的惡魔將軍。”
淫蕩的惡魔將軍？聽起來這兩個美女在我面前更有趣...

人物

艾里亞：

一個白髮小精靈，在勇敢的團隊中欣賞萊托。
她有一種高貴的精靈思維方式，並且討厭人類，除了勇敢的Laito。

維拉：

崇拜Laito的成員之一，她有紅頭髮和大乳房。
她在表面上看起來非常純真，但秘密地自慰無數次幻想萊托。

特徵

  • 20個美麗女孩的性感和色情圖像。
  • 一個夢幻般的色情故事，有著獨特的個性。
  • 如果您只想欣賞這個故事，就可以跳過難題。 （在難題期間按Enter）。
  • CG畫廊模式。 （完成拼圖後，單擊CG旁邊的左右按鈕）。

data.name: Hentai Tales: Fallen Brave Squad
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

"Everyone, the territory of the Lustful Demon General is ahead." Laito straightened her back, "We must unite to defeat this demon general who is good at confusing people."
Lustful Demon General? It sounds like these two beauties in front of me are more interesting...

Characters

Aylia:

A white-haired elf who admires Laito in the brave team.
She has a noble elf mindset and hates humans, except for the brave Laito.

Vera:

One of the members who worships Laito, she has red hair and big breasts.
She looks very innocent on the surface, but secretly she masturbates countless times fantasizing about Laito.

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
